titleStmt.title: SII 9.209: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 209. (A.R. No. 96 of 1927.) ON A STONE LYING OUTSIDE THE TEMPLE OF RAMESVARA AT NARASAPURAM, KALYANADRUG TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 48, Krōdhin, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, trayōdaśī, Ādivāra, corresponding to A.D. 1125 January 4, Sunday. It was, however, not a day of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from Kalyāṇa and mentions his feudatory Iruṅgōḷa-Chōḷamahārāja ruling from Gondavāḍi, the chief town of Kaṇiyakallu three-hundred, and the latter's subordinate Aiharasa ruling over Baṅgicheṟu thirty. Aiharasa is stated to have made a gift of land to Bhaṭṭa[śiva ?] of Baṅgicheṟu and another Paṇḍita (name lost).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuva
nāsraya śrīpritvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja
śrīparamēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ
satyāsrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ cā
ḷukyacakravartti tribhuvanamalladēvaru kalyā
ṇada nelevīḍinoḷu sukasaṁkatāvinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamiralu svasti śrīmanmahā
ma(ṁ)ṇḍaḷēsvara Iruṁgōḷacōḷamahārājaru ka
ṇiyakallu mūnūṟaṟa rājadhāni gondavāḍiya
nelevīḍinoḷu sukharājyaṁgeyuttamiralu kaṇi
yakalla dakṣaṇadisābhāgada baṁgiceṟu mūvatta
ṟa ma(ṁ)nneya svasti nāmādiprasastisahita śrīma
tu Aṟharasaru cāḷukyavikramakālada 408 krō
dhisaṁvatsarada Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti trayōda
si Ādivaradaṁdu baṁgiceṟa mahāsthāna bhaṭṭa
dēvargge bharaṇapaṇḍitare putra da
vapaṇḍitargge mūḍaṇa poladoḷu
ttaru 204 hiriyakeṟe kaḍuga 2 puli
lakeṟeya kaḍuga 2 holadalu nekaṟeṁga
ḷa hatu hatu koḷaga gadde mūvattu
ralu Ūralu haṇa buṭṭa datti .
Digital edition of SII 9.209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
